testcase.name: test_create_time_off_policy
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:679: in test_create_time_off_policy assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create time off policy failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create time off policy failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","time_off_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_PTO Policy","policy_type":"pto","accrual_rate":1.25,"accrual_frequency":"per_pay_period","max_balance":120.0,"max_carryover":40.0,"waiting_period_days":90,"min_increment_hours":1.0,"requires_approval":true,"advance_notice_days":14,"is_active":true,"description":"Standard PTO policy for testing"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_adjust_balance
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:709: in test_adjust_balance "policy_id": test_data['time_off_policy_id'], ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'time_off_policy_id'

testcase.name: test_create_time_off_request
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:745: in test_create_time_off_request "policy_id": test_data['time_off_policy_id'], ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'time_off_policy_id'

testcase.name: test_create_announcement
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:808: in test_create_announcement assert data['require_acknowledgement'] == True ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'require_acknowledgement'

testcase.name: test_create_course
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:874: in test_create_course assert data['is_required'] == True ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'is_required'

testcase.name: test_create_quiz
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:929: in test_create_quiz "course_id": test_data['course_id'], ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'course_id'

testcase.name: test_list_quizzes
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:971: in test_list_quizzes assert response.status_code == 200, f"List quizzes failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: List quizzes failed: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_article
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:997: in test_create_article assert data['is_published'] == True ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'is_published'

testcase.name: test_staff_cannot_create_time_off_policy
testcase.failure: tests/test_connecteam_phase1.py:1072: in test_staff_cannot_create_time_off_policy assert response.status_code == 403, f"Staff should be denied: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Staff should be denied: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","time_off_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"Unauthorized Policy","policy_type":"pto"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 403 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
